curation_notes: Re-curated. The patch commit is merge commit a803271 (PR #889), which replaces the auto-derived Deserialize for VecStorage with a manual implementation that validates nrows * ncols == data.len(). Only one non-test source file (src/base/vec_storage.rs) was modified. Pre-patch commit updated to 02614cb (first parent of merge commit) representing the dev branch state before the fix. L3 hints differentiated from L1/L2 per updated guidelines. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-119/CWE-787 and advisory description of out-of-bounds memory access via malformed deserialized input.
